caveats: Window restricted to 2019-2023: the five complete, comparable calendar years. The source also covers 2018 and 2024, but 2024's final months were still in claims runout at extract time, and 2018 predates the Jan-2019 ABA CPT codes (a $0 baseline for that category). Growth = 2019->2023.
Geography = provider ZIP (NPPES) -> county FIPS; 82% of categorized paid maps to a county/state (institutional billers with non-residential ZIPs are unmapped).

Billing attribution = billing-provider county; point-of-care = servicing-provider county (else billing). The dataset has NO patient address, so point-of-care is the closest patient-proximate lens, still provider-based.
Switching billing->point-of-care moves 5.5% of categorized spend to a different county; concentrated in clinician-delivered, agency-billed services.
Junk HCPCS code '20' ($20T) excluded by construction. HSS/ICS are partly MN-specific program names mapped to national HCPCS proxies; read Tier 3 nationally with care.

categories.name: Integrated Community Supports
categories.note: H2015/H2016 comprehensive community support used as proxy (also a MN-specific program name).

categories.name: Housing Stabilization Services
categories.note: Supported-housing codes H0043/H0044; under-captures atypical-provider agencies.
